Operating doctrine

Intelligence without theater.

HARUSPEX is designed as serious financial software, not a promise machine. It exposes system state, signal conviction, execution status, and risk before capital is committed.

01

Observe

Inspect market state, data freshness, and system health before exposure.

02

Validate

Move from historical testing to simulation and paper operation before live execution.

03

Constrain

Position sizing, loss limits, circuit breakers, and kill-switch controls operate independently.

04

Execute

Live Kraken Spot trading remains explicit, gated, and disabled by default.

Actual interface

One surface. Full awareness.

Interface preview. Performance figures are not claims of future results.

Core capabilities

Built to be understood.

01 / LATTICE

Probability Lattice

Real outcomes accumulate into a visible empirical distribution instead of disappearing into a black-box score.

02 / RISK

Independent safeguards

Exposure caps, daily loss limits, stale-data detection, and circuit breakers sit outside strategy logic.

03 / MODES

Progressive operation

Simulation, paper operation with Kraken data, and carefully gated live execution form a deliberate path.

04 / RESEARCH

Backtesting discipline

Fees, slippage, drawdowns, walk-forward testing, and sample size remain visible in evaluation.

05 / PRIVACY

Local-first architecture

No hidden telemetry. No cloud account required. API credentials and operational state remain under user control.

06 / CONTROL

Readable system state

Mode, connectivity, data age, exposure, heartbeat, and circuit-breaker status stay immediately legible.

Operating sequence

A controlled path to execution.

01

Research

Evaluate ideas against historical data with transparent assumptions.

02

Simulate

Run the complete decision process without exchange-side exposure.

03

Paper

Observe behavior against live Kraken market data before capital is used.

04

Deploy

Enable live operation only after configuration, risk, and acknowledgement checks pass.

Purchase HARUSPEX
HARUSPEX is sold as standalone software. The purchase price does not include trading advice, strategy customization, managed trading, or ongoing technical support. Documentation is included. Minor maintenance releases may be provided at the developer’s discretion. HARUSPEX does not guarantee profitability. Cryptocurrency trading involves substantial risk and can result in loss.
Roadmap

One system. Expanding capability.

The first release remains deliberately focused. New markets and broker integrations should strengthen the same platform—not fragment it.

V1.0 / CURRENT

Kraken Spot

Simulation, paper operation, live execution, probability lattice, backtesting, walk-forward analysis, and independent risk controls.

V1.X / PLANNED

Operational refinement

Installer improvements, expanded diagnostics, strategy packs, reporting, and deeper portfolio analytics.

V2.0 / FUTURE

Equities module

A separate market adapter and execution model designed around U.S. equities rather than copied from crypto assumptions.
